name: waiting room
hints: Elevator waiting room with closed doors and a call button.
PUSH BUTTON to call elevator. Force open doors as Spiderman to access the shaft.
OPEN DOOR to force elevator doors. WEST to hall (room 2). The shaft (room 6) is behind the doors.
notes: Ground floor elevator waiting room. PUSH BUTTON calls elevator. Force doors to access shaft (room 6). WEST to hall (room 2).
